## Description

<!-- Provide a brief description of your changes -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test coverage improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`dotnet test`)
- [ ] No new build warnings introduced
- [ ] Code follows project conventions (see `docs/CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] Test coverage maintained (≥80%)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] A2UI components are accessible (if UI changes)
- [ ] OpenTelemetry traces verified in Aspire Dashboard (if agent changes)
- [ ] MCP tools validated with manual testing (if tool changes)
- [ ] A2A protocol handshake tested (if protocol changes)

## Testing

<!-- Describe the testing you performed -->

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed
